title: Slate CRM Configuration Manager / Administrator
description:
This role is a critical role that supports the student admissions journey. The successful candidate will ensure the system’s stability, optimise data integrity, develop reports, and provide technical support across departments.

Key Responsibilities

System Configuration and Management: Maintain and customise the Slate database, design and update application forms, incorporate validation checks on data entry, build automation rules, and manage portals for applicants and staff to ensure a smooth user experience.

Support for CRM & Other Technologies: Can support CRM and other technological systems as required, including assisting with configuration, troubleshooting, and system implementation once the Slate setup is complete.

Data Management: Oversee data imports, exports, cleansing, and ensure seamless integration with campus systems such as the Student Information System (SIS) and payment gateway.

Reporting and Analytics: Develop complex queries, dashboards, and scheduled reports to provide insights for decision-making and monitor key performance metrics.

Communications and Events: Manage multi-channel communications, create personalised templates, and coordinate event communications and scheduling.

User Support and Strategic Planning: Collaborate with stakeholders to understand their needs and translate them into technical solutions. Lead user training, develop documentation, stay current with platform updates, and troubleshoot technical issues as the primary support contact with Technolutions.

Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Business, or related discipline.

At least 2 years of practical experience managing and implementing CRM systems, preferably Technolutions Slate.

Proficiency with Slate core modules such as Applications, Reader, Deliver, Portals, Rules, and Querying.

Proven ability to manage data imports/exports, ensure data quality, and develop system integrations.

Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, and relational databases.

Strong analytical skills with a solution-oriented mindset.

Strong problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder engagement skills.

postedCompany.description:
Do you still think the boutique agency cannot advanced your own tech recruitment career?

Are you considering to change your career path from big agency to enjoy the best commission structure and working with best in class tech clients in Singapore?

Join US!

We are the Singapore and China based technology recruitment agency and specialised in providing talent solution for internet and technology industry. Our client portfolio are including the global internet technology giants, technology MNC and Tech startup. Whatever technology clients you are think of? Yes we do have!

Due to confidence and client demand in Singapore, we're looking for an experienced tech recruitment Consultant to join our team to service our clients across Asia Pacific.

In this role you'll help our clients identify & hire talent people not only with the right skills and experience, but also the right motivational and cultural fit - people who'll stay and perform.
